title: Greenhouse vs Rippling
description: Compare Greenhouse vs Rippling in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right hr & people tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Rippling emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.5/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Greenhouse or Rippling?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Rippling edges ahead with a 4.5/5 rating. Greenhouse excels at Enterprise hiring platform with structured interviewing., while Rippling is stronger for Rippling is a unified platform for HR, IT, and finance that manages the full emp.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Greenhouse and Rippling?
faqs.answer: Greenhouse and Rippling differ in pricing ($150-200/mo vs $8–$15/mo per user), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Greenhouse cheaper than Rippling?
faqs.answer: Greenhouse starts at $150-200/mo while Rippling starts at $8–$15/mo per user. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Greenhouse or Rippling?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for hr & people. Rippling scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Greenhouse and Rippling together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Greenhouse or Rippling?
faqs.answer: Both Greenhouse and Rippling prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which hr & people tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Greenhouse for large teams, while Rippling may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $150-200/mo pricing.
